privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is /home/ga/PycharmProjects/genome_assembler. The three specific bugs to fix are: 1) assembler/io.py in read_fasta (drops the last record, needs to yield it), 2) assembler/sequence.py in reverse_complement (missing string reversal, needs [::-1]), and 3) assembler/overlap.py in merge_sequences (duplicates overlap, needs correct slicing of seq2).
